commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9580fad30553885f8663971e1bb75292389cb774)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a repo-local native Android/Apple i18n inventory generator, checked JSON inventory, package scripts, a CI check, prompt placeholder guidance, and focused tests.

PR surface: Tests +51, Config +24, Other +18457. Total +18532 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes for the review finding: source inspection of the current generated artifact at the PR head shows non-translatable structured/debug literals admitted by the new filter.
commands.review_followup: - The PR is a maintainer/member draft with a protected maintainer label, a real inventory correctness finding, and a CI routing decision that should stay with the author or maintainers.

target.title: feat(i18n): add native app locale inventory
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native Android and Apple strings were outside the Control UI translation checks, so adding a language could leave app surfaces silently untranslated.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add a deterministic inventory for Android Compose/UIKit/permission/discovery UI and Apple SwiftUI/UIKit sources across iOS, macOS, and shared OpenClawKit, define the shared 20-locale matrix, and expose stable inputs for the existing provider-backed translation refresh process. The extractor rejects build substitutions, persistence/config identifiers, JSON payloads, and test/generated paths while preserving source spacing and interpolation structure.

## User Impact

CI now detects native-app i18n drift across English plus 20 target locales: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, Hindi, Arabic, Italian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Indonesian, Polish, Thai, Vietnamese, Dutch, Persian, and Russian.

## Evidence

- `node --import tsx scripts/native-app-i18n.ts check` (`2,177` translatable entries)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/native-app-i18n.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Final autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

This is the foundation PR for the stacked Android, Apple, and refresh branches.
target.author: vincentkoc
